Founders Fund

Ferni is free.
Really free.

If you believe in what we're building, chip in. As a thank you, we'll unlock some perks.

Community

Free forever

Ferni is here for you

  • Unlimited conversations with Ferni
  • 7-minute heart-to-hearts
  • Full memory — I remember everything

Most Chosen

Founding Member

$10 /month

Chip in. Help us build this.

  • Unlimited conversation time (our thank you)
  • Meet the whole team (Maya, Peter, Alex, Jordan)
  • Your name on the Founders Wall (optional)
  • Vote on what we build next
Chip In

Change or cancel anytime. No hard feelings.

Founding Patron

$20 /month

You're shaping what we become

  • Everything in Founding Member
  • Full team access (including Nayan)
  • Early access to new features
  • Direct line to founders (monthly Q&A)
  • Family sharing — bring people you love
Chip In

Change or cancel anytime. No hard feelings.

Questions

Founders FAQ

Is Ferni really free forever?
Yes. Really. Ferni remembers you, listens to you, and shows up for you — forever free. No catch. We believe everyone deserves access to support.
Why should I chip in?
When you chip in, you help keep Ferni free for others. You're not buying a product — you're helping us build something we believe everyone deserves. As a thank you, we'll unlock some perks.
Can I change my support level?
Absolutely. Increase, decrease, or stop your support anytime. No hard feelings. We're grateful for any time you've been with us.
What's the Founders Wall?
It's our way of saying thank you. Founding Members can have their name displayed on a special page recognizing the people who helped build Ferni. Totally optional — you can stay anonymous too.

Built on trust.

Your conversations are yours. Always. We use enterprise-grade encryption and never sell your data.

Read our Privacy Policy
